mapper.select: SELECT D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , P.PRODUCT_ID , P.STORE_ID , P.CATEGORY_ID , P.PARTNER_ID , D.LOCATION_ID , D.STATUS , SPM.PARTNER_NM , SLM.LOCATION_NM , CM.CATEGORY_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM , D.LOT_NO , P.P_PRODUCT_CD , P.P_VARCODE_NO , DATE_FORMAT(D.RECEIVED_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RECEIVED_DATE , D.BOX_QTY , D.ORG_STOCK_QTY , D.ORG_STOCK_QTY - IFNULL(SD.QTY ,0) CUR_STOCK_QTY , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXPIRATION_DATE , D.COST_PRICE , P.ORG_SALES_PRICE ORG_PRICE /*기준가격 소비자가 */ , D.SALES_PRICE /* 판매가 마스터 테이블의 계산된 가격 */ , D.AGREED_PRICE , D.VARCODE_NO , D.DESCRIPTION , 'N' EDITOR , D.ETC_PRICE , (SELECT MAX(NAME) NAME FROM user_mst WHERE USER_ID = (CASE WHEN D.UPDATE_USER IS NOT NULL THEN D.UPDATE_USER ELSE D.CREATE_USER END) ) UPDATE_USER , CASE WHEN D.UPDATE_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN DATE_FORMAT(D.UPDATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(D.CREATE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') END UPDATE_DATE FROM product_mst P JOIN product_dtl D ON P.PRODUCT_ID = D.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst SLM ON D.LOCATION_ID = SLM.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN store_partner_mst SPM ON P.PARTNER_ID = SPM.PARTNER_ID LEFT JOIN category_mst CM ON P.CATEGORY_ID = CM.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SM.STORE_ID ,SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , SD.PRODUCT_ID , sum( SD.QTY) QTY FROM sales_mst SM JOIN sales_dtl SD ON SM.SALES_ID = SD.SALES_ID AND SD.product_id = #{productId} WHERE SM.SALES_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' GROUP BY SM.STORE_ID ,SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , SD.PRODUCT_ID ) SD ON D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID AND P.PRODUCT_ID = SD.PRODUCT_ID AND P.STORE_ID = SD.STORE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND D.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} -- 상품 ID로 필터링 ORDER BY D.LOT_NO DESC;

SELECT P.PRODUCT_ID , P.STORE_ID , P.CATEGORY_ID , P.PARTNER_ID , P.STATUS , SLM.LOCATION_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM , P.P_PRODUCT_CD /* 계열사 상품 코드 */ , P.P_VARCODE_NO /* 계열사 상품 코드 88코드 */ , P.STATUS , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') EXPIRATION_DATE , MAX(P.ORG_SALES_PRICE) ORG_SALES_PRICE /* 권장 소비자가 */ , P.DESCRIPTION , IFNULL(SUM(D.BOX_QTY), 0) AS BOX_QTY , IFNULL(SUM(D.ORG_STOCK_QTY), 0) - IFNULL(SUM(SD.QTY),0) AS CUR_STOCK_QTY , IFNULL(SUM(D.ORG_STOCK_QTY), 0) AS ORG_STOCK_QTY , C.CATEGORY_NM AS CATEGORY_NM , S.PARTNER_NM AS PARTNER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(MIN(D.RECEIVED_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS FIRST_RECEIVED_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(MAX(D.RECEIVED_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS LAST_RECEIVED_DATE , 'N' EDITOR FROM product_mst P LEFT JOIN product_dtl D ON P.PRODUCT_ID = D.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN store_location_mst SLM ON SLM.LOCATION_ID = D.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN category_mst C ON P.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN store_partner_mst S ON P.PARTNER_ID = S.PARTNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SM.STORE_ID , SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , SD.PRODUCT_ID , sum(SD.QTY ) QTY FROM sales_mst SM LEFT JOIN sales_dtl SD ON SM.SALES_ID = SD.SALES_ID WHERE SM.SALES_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' group by SM.STORE_ID , SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID , SD.PRODUCT_ID ) SD ON D.PRODUCT_DTL_ID = SD.PRODUCT_DTL_ID AND P.PRODUCT_ID = SD.PRODUCT_ID AND P.STORE_ID = SD.STORE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND P.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
AND C.CATEGORY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryNm}, '%')
AND P.PRODUCT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productNm}, '%')
AND D.RECEIVED_DATE >= #{receivedDateFrom}
AND D.RECEIVED_DATE <= #{receivedDateTo}
AND P.P_VARCODE_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{pvarcodeNo},'%')
GROUP BY P.PRODUCT_ID , P.STORE_ID , P.CATEGORY_ID , P.PARTNER_ID , P.PRODUCT_NM , P.P_PRODUCT_CD /* 계열사 상품 코드 88코드 */ , P.P_VARCODE_NO /* 계열사 상품 바코드 */ , P.STATUS , SLM.LOCATION_NM , P.DESCRIPTION , C.CATEGORY_NM , S.PARTNER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') HAVING 1=1
AND SUM(D.CUR_STOCK_QTY) > 0
AND NVL(SUM(D.CUR_STOCK_QTY),0) <= 0
ORDER BY P.CREATE_DATE DESC , (CASE WHEN MAX(D.RECEIVED_DATE) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ASC , C.CATEGORY_NM , P.PRODUCT_NM ASC , LAST_RECEIVED_DATE DESC

SELECT V.PRODUCT_ID , PM.STORE_ID , PM.CATEGORY_ID , PM.PARTNER_ID , PM.STATUS , V.LOCATION_NM , PM.PRODUCT_NM , PM.P_PRODUCT_CD , PM.P_VARCODE_NO , PM.STATUS , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS EXPIRATION_DATE , MAX(PM.ORG_SALES_PRICE) AS ORG_SALES_PRICE , PM.DESCRIPTION , IFNULL(SUM(D.BOX_QTY), 0) AS BOX_QTY , V.CUR_STOCK_QTY , V.ORG_STOCK_QTY , V.CATEGORY_NM , V.PARTNER_NM , DATE_FORMAT(MIN(D.RECEIVED_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS FIRST_RECEIVED_DATE , DATE_FORMAT(MAX(D.RECEIVED_DATE), '%Y-%m-%d') AS LAST_RECEIVED_DATE , 'N' AS EDITOR
FROM v_product_stock V JOIN product_mst PM ON V.PRODUCT_ID = PM.PRODUCT_ID
LEFT JOIN product_dtl D ON PM.PRODUCT_ID = D.PRODUCT_ID AND V.LOCATION_ID = D.LOCATION_ID AND (D.EXPIRATION_DATE IS NULL OR D.EXPIRATION_DATE >= CURDATE())
WHERE 1=1
AND PM.STORE_ID = #{storeId}
AND V.CATEGORY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryNm}, '%')
AND PM.PRODUCT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productNm}, '%')
AND (D.RECEIVED_DATE IS NULL OR D.RECEIVED_DATE >= #{receivedDateFrom})
AND (D.RECEIVED_DATE IS NULL OR D.RECEIVED_DATE <= #{receivedDateTo})
AND V.P_VARCODE_NO LIKE CONCAT('%',#{pvarcodeNo},'%')
GROUP BY V.PRODUCT_ID , PM.STORE_ID , PM.CATEGORY_ID , PM.PARTNER_ID , PM.PRODUCT_NM , PM.P_PRODUCT_CD , PM.P_VARCODE_NO , PM.STATUS , V.LOCATION_NM , PM.DESCRIPTION , V.CATEGORY_NM , V.PARTNER_NM , V.CUR_STOCK_QTY , V.ORG_STOCK_QTY , DATE_FORMAT(D.EXPIRATION_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d')
HAVING 1=1
AND V.CUR_STOCK_QTY > 0
AND IFNULL(V.CUR_STOCK_QTY,0) <= 0
ORDER BY PM.CREATE_DATE DESC , (CASE WHEN MAX(D.RECEIVED_DATE) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ASC , V.CATEGORY_NM , PM.PRODUCT_NM ASC , LAST_RECEIVED_DATE DESC

SELECT U.USER_ID , U.NAME , U.PHONE , U.GENDER , U.AGE_RANGE , U.ADDRESS , U.BIRTHDAY , CONCAT( TIMESTAMPDIFF( YEAR, STR_TO_DATE( REPLACE(U.BIRTHDAY, '-', ''), -- 하이픈 있으면 제거 '%Y%m%d' ), CURDATE() ), '세') AS AGE , DATE_FORMAT(U.CREATE_DATE , '%y-%m-%d') CREATE_DATE , COALESCE(SUM(S.TOTAL_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_PRICE FROM user_mst U LEFT JOIN sales_mst S ON U.USER_ID = S.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND ( U.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%' #{searchTxt} '%') OR U.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%' #{searchTxt} '%') OR U.PHONE LIKE CONCAT('%' #{searchTxt} '%') )
GROUP BY U.USER_ID , U.NAME , U.PHONE , U.GENDER , U.AGE_RANGE , U.ADDRESS , DATE_FORMAT(U.CREATE_DATE , '%y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(U.CREATE_DATE , '%y-%m-%d') DESC
